testcase.classname: sum utility [@describeTag] adds 1 and 2 to equal 3 [@tc:262]
testcase.name: sum utility [@describeTag] adds 1 and 2 to equal 3 [@tc:262]

testcase.classname: sum utility [@describeTag] adds 0 and 0 to equal 0 [@tc:262]
testcase.name: sum utility [@describeTag] adds 0 and 0 to equal 0 [@tc:262]

testcase.classname: sum utility [@describeTag] adds -3 and 7 to equal 4 [@tc:262]
testcase.name: sum utility [@describeTag] adds -3 and 7 to equal 4 [@tc:262]

testcase.classname: isEven utility returns true for even values [@tc:254]
testcase.name: isEven utility returns true for even values [@tc:254]

testcase.classname: isEven utility returns false for odd values like 1 [@tc:263]
testcase.name: isEven utility returns false for odd values like 1 [@tc:263]

testcase.classname: isEven utility returns false for odd values like 3 [@tc:263]
testcase.name: isEven utility returns false for odd values like 3 [@tc:263]

testcase.classname: isEven utility returns false for odd values like 5 [@tc:263]
testcase.name: isEven utility returns false for odd values like 5 [@tc:263]

testcase.classname: isEven utility returns false for odd numbers (failing) [@tc:255]
testcase.name: isEven utility returns false for odd numbers (failing) [@tc:255]
